text: 1d4 chwinga astronauts,* each mounted on 1 space guppy* - 1d6 + 4
1 cosmic horror* (30 percent chance it is asleep) - 1d6
1 giant octopus that has a flying speed of 60 feet and doesn't need to breathe air - 1d10
1 kindori* with 1 druid† living in a hut on its back - 2d6 + 3
1 kraken that has a flying speed of 60 feet and doesn't need to breathe air - 1d6
1 lunar dragon* (your choice of young, adult, or ancient) - 1d10
A tavern or inn built on an asteroid, with docks where ships can berth
A shipwreck that might still have treasure or creatures aboard it (choose a ship from chapter 2 of the Astral Adventurer's Guide)
1 solar dragon* (your choice of young, adult, or ancient) - 2d6
3d6 stirges that don't need to breathe air - 1d6
1 spelljamming ship (roll on the Ship Encounters table)
